description_long: This is a modern bed with a minimalist design, featuring a rectangular frame and a prominent, flat headboard. The bed frame appears to be constructed from a dark-colored material, likely wood or metal, with clean, straight lines and no visible ornamentation. The mattress is light in color and sits flush within the frame, with no visible bedding except for a fitted sheet. The bed lacks a footboard, giving it an open and accessible appearance from the foot end. The overall silhouette is low-profile, with the mattress sitting close to the ground. The design is functional and contemporary, suitable for urban interiors or modern living spaces.
description: A modern, low-profile bed with a dark frame, flat headboard, and a light-colored mattress, featuring a minimalist and functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat headboard and the full width of the light mattress within the dark frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the mattress and the height of the headboard relative to the frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, unadorned back of the headboard and the rectangular shape of the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the mattress depth and the headboard's height.
